title: stevia entreriensis var. typica
intro: Stevia entreriensis var. typica, also known as the 'typical' or 'typical stevia', is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to Paraguay. This plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and its antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of stevia entreriensis var. typica include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve insulin sensitivity, and act as a natural sweetener due to its high concentration of stevioside and rebaudioside, which are sweet-tasting compounds. Stevia entreriensis var. typica is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and its extracts are used in various food products, including sugar-free sweeteners and dietary supplements.
